context: Tests whether the agent follows the correct ordered validation workflow: yamllint first, then syntax-check, then ansible-lint, then security and secrets scanning, using wrapper scripts throughout, and reading reference files when issues are found.

checklist.name: yamllint run first
checklist.description: The report documents yamllint being run before ansible-playbook --syntax-check

checklist.name: check_fqcn script used
checklist.description: The report documents running `bash scripts/check_fqcn.sh` (or equivalent FQCN check)

checklist.name: Security scan with wrapper
checklist.description: The report documents running `bash scripts/validate_playbook_security.sh` for security scanning

checklist.name: validate_certs issue found
checklist.description: The report identifies the `validate_certs: false` setting as a security issue

checklist.name: no-changed-when issue found
checklist.description: The report identifies that the `command` tasks (systemctl status, tool --version) are missing `changed_when`

checklist.name: missing mode on template
checklist.description: The report notes that the template task is missing a `mode:` attribute

checklist.name: Reference file cited
checklist.description: The report references at least one of the skill reference files (common_errors.md, best_practices.md, or security_checklist.md) in connection with a finding

checklist.name: Overall summary present
checklist.description: The report includes a final pass/fail or summary section

checklist.name: Correct step ordering
checklist.description: The report shows YAML syntax check occurring before lint, and lint before security scan (correct ordering)
